scripts.langchain-python:install-dev: cd sdk-python && python -m pip install -e .[dev] && cd ..\integrations\langchain-python && python -m pip install -e .[dev]
scripts.lint:crewai: python -m ruff check integrations/crewai/src integrations/crewai/tests integrations/crewai/examples
scripts.lint:semantic-kernel: python -m ruff check integrations/semantic-kernel/src integrations/semantic-kernel/tests integrations/semantic-kernel/examples
scripts.lint:langchain-python: python -m ruff check integrations/langchain-python/src integrations/langchain-python/tests integrations/langchain-python/examples
scripts.semantic-kernel:install-dev: cd sdk-python && python -m pip install -e .[dev] && cd ..\integrations\semantic-kernel && python -m pip install -e .[dev]
scripts.test:langchain: npm --prefix sdk run build && npm --prefix integrations/langchain test
